places.title: Bora Ali
places.subtitle: Your personal food diary
places.search: Search by name, category, or note...

map.title: Places map
map.empty: No places have a saved location.

empty.title: No places yet
empty.description: Add your first place to get started.

emptySearch.title: No places found
emptySearch.description: Try another name, category, or note.

pwa.installAria: Install Bora Ali on this device
pwa.iosButtonAria: See how to install Bora Ali on iPhone or iPad
pwa.iosDescription: On iPhone and iPad, Bora Ali is installed from the browser menu. This button opens the instructions.
pwa.iosStepSafari: If you are using another browser, open this site in Safari first.
pwa.iosStepShare: Tap the Share button in Safari's toolbar.
pwa.iosStepAdd: Choose 'Add to Home Screen' and confirm.
pwa.iosStepFallback: If 'Add to Home Screen' is missing, scroll the list, tap 'Edit Actions', and enable it there.
pwa.androidDescription: On Android, Chrome may show the native install prompt or ask you to install from the browser menu.
pwa.androidStepInstall: Choose 'Install app' or 'Add to Home screen' and confirm.
pwa.androidStepFallback: If the option is missing, refresh the page and try again after it finishes loading.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Update your details, profile photo, and password.

placeDetail.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this place?
placeDetail.deleteConfirmRestore: You can restore it from the trash.
placeDetail.coordsPending: Coordinates are being processed. The map will appear soon.
placeDetail.coordsFailed: Could not extract coordinates. Edit the place and save again to retry.

consumables.title: Consumables summary
consumables.empty: Add a visit with food or drinks consumed to track prices and average ratings.

placeForm.saveAndResolveMapsUrlHint: Short Maps URLs are saved and processed immediately.
placeForm.coordsNotFound: Coordinates not found in this URL. Use the full Google Maps URL.

sections.photoDescription: Cover image to recognize this place quickly.

editPlace.title: Edit place

editPlace.coordsFailed: The Maps URL could not be resolved right now. Adjust the URL and save again.

visitForm.consumedDescription: Add each consumable with price, rating, and comments.

upload.invalidType: Format not allowed. Use JPEG, PNG or WEBP.

trash.permanentDeleteMessage: This action cannot be undone. The place and all its data will be permanently removed.

termsModal.title: Terms of Use
termsModal.description: To continue using Bora Ali, please read and accept our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy. You can open the documents below before accepting.
termsModal.accept: I have read and accept the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
termsModal.disclaimer: By accepting, you confirm that you are at least 13 years old.
termsModal.error: Could not record your acceptance. Please try again.
